payload.subject: Reusable formwork panels — stronger alternative to OSB (site use)
payload.body:
Hi —

We supply film-faced eucalyptus panels used on concrete job sites for formwork.
They’re designed for repeat reuse cycles and moisture durability.

If useful, I can send specs + container pricing.
How are you currently sourcing formwork panels (and typical monthly usage)?

Regards,
Supply Program

payload.subject: Film-faced eucalyptus panel supply program (containers/month)
payload.body:
Hi —

We run a U.S. structural panel supply program focused on film-faced eucalyptus panels for formwork and industrial applications.

If you’re absorbing containers monthly, we can offer:
- consistent spec + factory capacity
- container program pricing
- inspection docs + load photos
- stable lead times

What volume are you moving per month (containers) and which states do you service?

Regards,
Supply Program
